The Reality

You're Losing Leads Right Now

Most beauty businesses don't lose clients because of bad work. The work is good.


They lose clients because a DM went unanswered. Because a follow-up never got sent. Because life got busy and a lead just fell through the cracks.


You're doing everything right — and still leaving money on the table. That's not a work ethic problem. That's a systems problem.

  • ◆A potential client DMs you at 10pm. You see it the next morning. They already booked someone else.
  • ◆You're with a client and miss three inquiries. By the time you reply, two of them have gone cold.
  • ◆You meant to follow up with that lead from last week. You forgot. That's 00–00 gone.
  • ◆You're manually confirming appointments one by one, every single day.
  • ◆Your Instagram sits there collecting comments with no one to respond.

The problem isn't you. The problem is you don't have a system working for you while you work for your clients.

The Process

How We Build Your System

01

Strategy Call

We start with a free 30-minute call to map out exactly where your business is losing leads and what systems will fix it.

02

Custom Build

We build your automation flows to match your brand voice and business needs. Fully customized — never templated, never robotic.

03

Launch & Test

Your system goes live within 2–3 weeks. We test every flow before handing it over to make sure it's running perfectly.

04

Ongoing Management

We monitor, maintain, and optimize your system every month so you never have to think about it again.

The Person Behind It

Built by Someone Who Knows the Tech

Jayla Walker Owner & Lead Automation Strategist

Before building Walker Systems & Automation, I spent years working directly in AI — contributing to model training projects for some of the most recognized names in tech. I didn't just learn about AI from the outside. I worked inside it.

That experience gave me something most automation agency owners can't claim — a deep understanding of how these systems actually think, behave, and perform. I built Walker Systems because I saw how many service-based businesses were losing money not from bad service, but from broken communication and missed opportunities.

We believe you shouldn't have to choose between doing great work and growing. We build the systems that handle growth — so you can focus on your craft.

FAQ

Common Questions

Automation is a system that handles repetitive communication tasks for you — like replying to DMs, confirming appointments, sending follow-ups, and capturing lead information. Once it's built and running, it works in the background 24/7 without you lifting a finger.

Never. Every system is fully customized to match your brand voice and tone. Some clients even choose to be upfront with their customers — "Jessica is with a client right now, but I'm her digital assistant." It feels personal, professional, and on-brand — never cold or generic.

Most systems are fully built and live within 2–3 weeks from your strategy call. The timeline depends on the complexity of your setup and how quickly we receive your account access and content.

Not at all. We handle every technical aspect of the build — you just need to show up for the strategy call, share your brand voice, and give us access to your platforms. We take care of the rest.

We build on Instagram, Facebook, SMS, email, and website chat. For Growth clients, we also integrate GoHighLevel for full CRM and pipeline management. If you use a specific booking platform, we'll work to connect that too.

After your initial 3-month commitment, your plan automatically rolls to month-to-month at the same rate. You're free to continue, upgrade, or cancel with 30 days written notice — no pressure, no penalties.

Yes — all retainer plans begin with a 3-month minimum commitment. This exists because real results take time, and we want to make sure you actually get to see your system perform. After month 3, everything goes month-to-month automatically. Note: standalone services do not require a contract.

No problem at all. Our standalone services are built exactly for that. You can start with one specific build — like a DM automation setup or a lead capture flow — with no monthly commitment, no maintenance, and no contract. It's a great way to see what automation can do for your business before going all in.
